overview_p1: The World Masters Hockey Cup is the premier international field hockey tournament for masters-age players, held every four years and organised by World Hockey. Rotterdam 2026 will see over 50 nations compete across seven age categories, from Over-35 to Over-70, at the world-class facilities of the Hockeyclub Rotterdam.
overview_p2: Hong Kong Masters Hockey is proud to be sending four squads — our largest-ever representation at a World Masters Cup. Years of preparation, fundraising, and training have gone into building squads that we believe can genuinely challenge for medals.
overview_p3: For full tournament details including draw results, match schedules, and live scoring, visit the official World Hockey website once the tournament begins.

key_dates.event: Final squad registration deadline with World Hockey
Departure flight from Hong Kong International Airport

travel.title: Flights
travel.body: Group flights from Hong Kong International Airport are being arranged via [Travel Agent Name]. Individual bookings must be approved by the team manager. Details to be confirmed by March 1, 2026.

travel.title: Accommodation
travel.body: The club has secured a block booking at [Hotel Name] in central Rotterdam. All squad members are expected to stay together. Room-sharing arrangements will be communicated by the team manager.

travel.title: Kit & Equipment
travel.body: Official HK Masters playing kit will be provided to all registered players. Players are responsible for their own sticks, shin guards, and footwear. Kit collection event: May 1, 2026.
